title: August.
content:
God in His own right hand doth take each day - 
         Each sun-filled day - each rare and radiant night,
        And drop it softly on the earth and say:
         "Touch earth with heaven's own beauty and delight."
meaning:
This evocative piece by Jean Blewett, titled "August.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
